title: Add ML model explainability
original_text: Implemented model explainability features. Added SHAP values for feature importance. Implemented LIME for local explanations. Added partial dependence plots. Implemented counterfactual explanations. Added model interpretation dashboard. Added explainability API endpoints. Added tests for explainability features. Result: model explainability working.
expected_subject: feat(ml): add model explainability with SHAP and LIME
expected_body_lines: - Add SHAP values for feature importance
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ml): add model explainability with SHAP and LIME"
